easy.title: Write String List to File
easy.description: Write list of strings to file, one per line.

medium.title: Append Timestamped Log Entry
medium.description: Append line `[TIMESTAMP] msg` to log file.
medium.solution:
import datetime
def log_msg(fn, msg):
    ts = datetime.datetime.now().isoformat()
    with open(fn, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(f'[{ts}] {msg}\n')
    return True

hard.title: Safe Atomic File Writer
hard.description: Write data to temp file then use os.replace for atomic save.
hard.solution:
import os
def atomic_write(fn, data):
    tmp = fn + '.tmp'
    with open(tmp, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(data)
    os.replace(tmp, fn)
    return True

debugging.title: Fix Overwrite Bug
bugs: Mode 'w' truncates existing data; change to 'a'.
